meaning: n.[哲]心灵,理性,精神,<口>常识
examples: Du haute de ces Pyramides 40 siècles nous contemplent.
The pronoun on is used much more often to mean we than nous.
But other countries, with less financial nous and more debt, face red.
Quels pronostics les apports de la culture et des savoirs humanistes nous permettent-ils de faire ?
In the French proverb quoted by Madame de Pompadour to Louis XV: Apres nous le deluge.
